steps.title: Solve for H
steps.content: Starting with $V_B = \frac{V_P}{1-H}$, multiply both sides by $(1-H)$: $$V_B(1-H) = V_P$$ $$V_B - V_B H = V_P$$ $$V_B H = V_B - V_P$$ $$H = \frac{V_B - V_P}{V_B} = 1 - \frac{V_P}{V_B}$$

steps.title: Evaluate Each Choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — $H = 1 - \frac{V_P}{V_B}$: Matches our derived result exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — $H = \frac{V_B}{V_P}$: This is the reciprocal of $V_P/V_B$, not what we derived. ✗
  • Choice C — $H = 1 + \frac{V_B}{V_P}$: Sign and ratio direction are both wrong. ✗
  • Choice D — $H = V_B - V_P$: Dimensionally wrong; H must be a unitless fraction between 0 and 1. ✗
That is the correct answer.
